* Remove obsolete comment and code

description.text:
This prepares https://github.com/JabRef/jabref/issues/110

This is based on https://github.com/JabRef/jabref/pull/11728 - thus, the first commits are doubled. With some "git magic" they, don't appear in the diff.

Contributes to https://github.com/JabRef/jabref-issue-melting-pot/issues/440

See #14400 for the steps to do.

`org.jabref.logic.pseudonymization.Pseudonymization` should be availble on the CLI

Similar CLI experience than consistency check.

See class [`org.jabref.cli.CheckConsistency`](https://github.com/JabRef/jabref/blob/53bfd6ffd94490d4e97b6a5ac2d85f62e8c9ed95/jabkit/src/main/java/org/jabref/cli/CheckConsistency.java) for the implementation of the consistency check.
